target: 1. Return After Two Years
July 22nd
We will soon be arriving at Hitogashima.
Ushio!!
N-Nagumo-sensei!?
A... Alive...!!
What...?
Boy... This should be our first time meeting, shouldn't it...?
Huh...?
B-But! Hizuru-san, you're Nagumo Ryunosuke-sensei... Right...!?
Wha...!
Why... do you know my true identity!?
(Hitogashima Island, floating in the Kii Channel, part of Wakayama City, Wakayama Prefecture. The island you can see behind us is Awaji Island.)
(I'm returning to my hometown for the first time in two years—)
(...I came... back... But...)
(Huh? I've seen this scenery before...)
(Well, it's my hometown so that's obvious, but... It feels like I saw it just recently...?)
(Th-That person from earlier...)
(And the fact that she's Nagumo Ryunosuke... Why... did I know that...?)
Heeeeey!!
…Huh?
Welcome back, Shin-chan!! Good job on the long journey~~~~~!!
Mio!
Mio, look out!!!!
...What are you doing, Shin-chan...
...You're right... What am I doing...
Hey, Shinpei!! You finally came back! It's been two years, hasn't it!?
Welcome back, Shinpei-san!
Sou! Toki-chan!
(Everyone... Thank goodness, you're safe...)
(...Safe...? Huh... why am I... so happy right now...)
Hey, Sou... Why did I come back again...?
Huh!? Hey now... are you okay?
You got a message from Ushio, right!? She was talking about it on the phone yesterday!!
"If I don't come back this year, Ushio's gonna kill me!"
Shin-chan. Why did you come straight to Kofune? Shouldn't you have gone to your own house first?
Ah... yeah...
My parents are on a business trip. No one's home today anyway...
You say that, but~ You just wanted to see my sister as soon as possible, right!?

H-Huh!?
That's not it at all!!
I'm hooooome!
Oh, Shinpei!! Welcome back!
I'm back.
Oh my!! If it isn't Shinpei-kun!
Hey! You've grown a bit since the last time we saw you, haven't you!!
Have you made up with Ushio-chan!?
Ah... no, not yet...
Ever since Shinpei decided to go to Tokyo, it's been a cold war between you two.
But she called me yesterday.
She yelled at me to come back for summer vacation.
Yeah, I could hear her all the way from my room.
She was saying, "Should I go to Tokyo, grab him by the scruff of the neck, and drag him back along the Tokaido?"
Scary!? It's even scarier because Ushio-chan would actually do it!!
Be careful, Shin-chan. Sis... said she'd definitely punch you once when she saw you.
...I'll be prepared...
Sis? Are you there~?
Huh, she's not here... Where did she go?
(...The beach...?)
Shin-chan!?
(I thought Ushio might actually come all the way to Tokyo if I didn't come back—)
(That's part of it...)
(But the main reason I came back was...)
(Because I felt like if I didn't see her now, I'd never be able to see her again.)
(I just wanted to see her face one more time... that's all...)
